style_effects: Intense orange-red embers drift upward in slow, lazy spirals around Electabuzz, each glowing with molten core intensity. A crackling crimson aura pulses rhythmically, casting dynamic heat shimmer waves that distort the air like a desert mirage. The lighting mood is a warm amber glow with sharp highlights of molten gold, illuminating the surroundings with a vibrant, energetic firelight. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
